{ "name": "graham-campbell/guzzle-factory", "description": "Provides A Simple Guzzle Factory With Good Defaults", "keywords": ["guzzle", "http", "guzzle factory", "guzzle-factory", "Guzzle", "Guzzle Factory", "Guzzle-Factory", "Graham Campbell", "GrahamCampbell"], "license": "MIT", "authors": [ { "name": "Graham Campbell", "email": "hello@gjcampbell.co.uk", "homepage": "https://github.com/GrahamCampbell" } ], "require": { "php": "^7.4.15 || ^8.0.2", "guzzlehttp/guzzle": "^7.9.2", "guzzlehttp/psr7": "^2.7.0" }, "require-dev": { "graham-campbell/analyzer": "^4.2.1", "phpunit/phpunit": "^9.6.14 || ^10.5.1" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "GrahamCampbell\\GuzzleFactory\\": "src/" } }, "autoload-dev": { "psr-4": { "GrahamCampbell\\Tests\\GuzzleFactory\\": "tests/" } }, "config": { "preferred-install": "dist" } }
